chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI S.S.T.R.A. No.1632 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE: 1. For order on CMA No.3935/2024 (Urgent). 2. For order on CMA No.3936/2024 (u/o. 23 r.1 CPC). 3. For order on CMA No.4474/2023 (Exemption). 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For order on CMA No.4475/2024 (Stay). ----------- Dated; 30th October 2024 Mr. Shahrukh Khan Brohi, Advocate for Applicant. -*-*-*-*-*- 1. Urgency granted. 2. This is an application filed under Order XXIII Rule 1 CPC for unconditional withdrawal of this Reference Application, which is supported by the affidavit of authorized person of the Applicant department. Accordingly, the same is allowed. This Reference Application stands dismissed as withdrawn alongwith pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
